questions.question: What is the man in the white shirt holding and demonstrating?
questions.answer_key: A small mechanical or electronic device, possibly a component or tool
required_visual_evidence: man holding small object in hand
questions.rationale: High-need window (0-3s): main action is holding/presenting an object; essential for understanding the clip's purpose

questions.question: What type of setting or environment is the man in?
questions.answer_key: A laboratory or technical workspace with equipment, computers, and machinery
questions.rationale: High-need window (0-3s): setting context helps blind listener understand the professional/technical nature of the demonstration

questions.question: What is visible on the wooden board or surface shown in the later frames?
questions.answer_key: Documents, papers, and sticky notes with yellow and pink highlighting attached to board
questions.rationale: High-need window (8.9-14.9s): visual documentation of work or planning; indicates organized project management

questions.question: How many times does the man's facial expression or gesture change across the frames?
questions.answer_key: His expression shifts from neutral/serious to smiling, showing engagement or enthusiasm
questions.rationale: High-need window (0-3s): emotional tone conveys confidence and positive attitude toward the demonstration

questions.question: What organizational or planning materials are visible in the workspace?
questions.answer_key: Multiple printed documents and sticky notes organized on a board, suggesting active project tracking
questions.rationale: High-need window (11.9-14.9s): visual evidence of systematic work process; helps blind listener understand scope of activity
